title: Advanced Achievements
description: Advanced Achievements enables unique and challenging achievements on Minecraft servers.
body:
**Elevate Your Minecraft Server with Advanced Achievements!**

- Added support for 1.20+ MC versions.
- Added Java 21 requirement.
- Updated all dependencies and libraries to 2024 versions.
- Fixed and replaced deprecated methods.
- Improved potion handling and recognition.

Are you ready to supercharge your Minecraft server with a plugin that's as powerful as it is addictive? Tired of the limitations of Vanilla advancements holding back your players? **Introducing Advanced Achievements**—the highly acclaimed plugin, honed from early 2015 to late 2021, that's guaranteed to elevate your server to legendary status!

Craft a unique set of custom achievements and inject fresh roleplay, fierce competition, and thrilling challenges into your community.

![Advanced Achievements Screenshot](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PyvesB/advanced-achievements/refs/heads/master/images/walking-dead-screenshot.png)

**Why Choose Advanced Achievements?**

- **🚀 Over 55 Achievement Categories:** Dive into a vast array of categories like player kills, custom mobs, fishing triumphs, playtime milestones, potion mastery, sharpshooting, and so much more!
- **🎮 Special Achievements via Commands:** Award unique achievements directly through in-game commands for ultimate control.
- **🛠️ Feature-Rich Commands:** Explore **18 in-game commands** packed with exciting features.
- **✨ Stunning GUI:** Impress your players with a highly customizable interface that showcases achievements, stats, and progress in an eye-catching way.
- **🏆 Competitive Leaderboards:** Ignite the spirit of competition with **all-time, monthly, and weekly rankings**.
- **🎆 Dazzling Effects & Notifications:** Celebrate achievements with fireworks, screen titles, boss bars, particle effects, and customizable sounds. Keep players engaged with interactive texts, action bar, and toast messages.
- **💎 Reward System:** Motivate players with in-game currency, custom items, XP boosts, increased max health or oxygen levels, or execute custom commands.
- **📖 Roleplay Enhancements:** Encourage community interaction with shareable achievement books.
- **🌐 Seamless Vanilla Integration:** For 1.12+ servers, blend Advanced Achievements seamlessly with vanilla advancements.
- **🔗 Advanced Command Block Support:** Unlock creative possibilities with advanced command selectors.
- **🧩 Extensive Plugin Compatibility:** Fully compatible with numerous popular plugins (see list below).
- **🎨 Unlimited Customization:** Tailor every aspect—names, goals, descriptions, styles, colors—to your server's unique flavor.
- **⚙️ Flexible Configuration:** Fine-tune the plugin with dozens of adjustable settings.
- **🌍 Multilingual Support:** Customize all displayed texts with a language file; choose from **19 available translations**.
- **🔐 Granular Permissions System:** Precisely control access with an advanced permissions setup.
- **💾 Multiple Database Support:** Choose the database that suits you—SQLite, H2, MySQL, or PostgreSQL.
- **📅 Broad Version Compatibility:** Supports any Minecraft version from 1.7.9 to 1.12.2 (plugin version 7.3.0) and 1.13+ (plugin version 8.0.2).
- **👨‍💻 Developer-Friendly API:** Leverage a well-documented API with extensive methods for seamless integration.
- **⚡ Optimized Performance:** Designed for efficiency and fully compatible with Java 8+.

**Plugin Integrations:**

- **Vault:** Integrate money rewards seamlessly.
- **PetMaster:** Expand achievement objectives.
- **BungeeTabListPlus:** Display stats directly in the tab list.
- **PlaceholderAPI:** Access a wide variety of placeholders.
- **Essentials:** Implement anti-AFK measures for playtime achievements.
- **Plan:** Provide players with detailed statistics.
- **MythicMobs:** Create achievement objectives for custom mob kills.
- **AALP Hook:** Automate LuckPerms group changes upon achievement unlocks.
- **Custom Heads:** Set achievement objectives for head placements.
- **Jobs Reborn:** Link achievements to job leveling progress.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d1eb2110a2438463131ea289e6d4c7b6521c683.png)

**Dive into the Advanced Achievements Universe!**

Ready to transform your server into a hub of excitement and competition? **Get started today** by visiting our [Wiki](https://github.com/PyvesB/advanced-achievements/wiki) and unleash the full potential of your Minecraft community!

---

**Note:** Developed with dedication from February 2015 to November 2021. No further updates are planned post-November, but the plugin remains a powerful tool for enhancing your server.

**Note 2:** Updated and it will continue to support newer Minecraft versions.

[Discord Support](https://discord.gg/v3SjfAQsdB)

This plugin was updated and tested at [sentouki.net](https://www.sentouki.net/)
